		<title>Openwrt安装lnmp</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2017/11/07/openwrt%e5%ae%89%e8%a3%85lnmp/</link>
		<pubDate>Tue, 07 Nov 2017 13:22:32 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://zanjie1999.16mb.com/?p=920</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[这个嘛...其实我已经装过很多次了,可能配置文件写的比较丑又懒得再写一遍就一直用下来了

<hr />

安装需要的包:

<code>opkg install nginx
opkg install php7-mod-mysqli php7-mod-pdo-mysql mysql-server
opkg install php7-mod-curl php7-mod-gd php7-mod-iconv php7-mod-json php7-mod-mbstring php7-mod-opcache php7-mod-session php7-mod-zip
opkg install php7-fpm</code>

大概要装的就这些,还有其他要用的PHP库就装吧

<hr />

配置文件,大概就是换掉就好了,有其他需求自己改一下咯:

<!--more-->

/etc/nginx/nginx.conf

<code>#user nobody nogroup;
user root root;
worker_processes  1;

error_log  /tmp/log/nginx/error.log;
#error_log  logs/error.log  notice;
#error_log  logs/error.log  info;

pid        /tmp/log/nginx/nginx.pid;


events {
    use epoll;
    worker_connections  1024;
}


http {
    include       mime.types;
    default_type  application/octet-stream;

    #log_format  main  '$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" '
    #                  '$status $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" '
    #                  '"$http_user_agent" "$http_x_forwarded_for"';

    #access_log  logs/access.log  main;

    sendfile        on;
    tcp_nopush     on;

    #keepalive_timeout  0;
    keepalive_timeout  65;

    #gzip  on;

    include       php.conf;


#    server {
#        listen       80;
#        server_name  localhost;

        #charset koi8-r;

        #access_log  logs/host.access.log  main;

#        location / {
#            root   html;
#            index  index.html index.htm;
#        }

        #error_page  404              /404.html;

        # redirect server error pages to the static page /50x.html
        #
#        error_page   500 502 503 504  /50x.html;
#        location = /50x.html {
#            root   html;
#        }

        # proxy the PHP scripts to Apache listening on 127.0.0.1:80
        #
        #location ~ \.php$ {
        #    proxy_pass   http://127.0.0.1;
        #}

        # pass the PHP scripts to FastCGI server listening on 127.0.0.1:9000
        #
        #location ~ \.php$ {
        #    root           html;
        #    fastcgi_pass   127.0.0.1:9000;
        #    fastcgi_index  index.php;
        #    fastcgi_param  SCRIPT_FILENAME  /scripts$fastcgi_script_name;
        #    include        fastcgi_params;
        #}

        # deny access to .htaccess files, if Apache's document root
        # concurs with nginx's one
        #
        #location ~ /\.ht {
        #    deny  all;
        #}
#    }


    # another virtual host using mix of IP-, name-, and port-based configuration
    #
    #server {
    #    listen       8000;
    #    listen       somename:8080;
    #    server_name  somename  alias  another.alias;

    #    location / {
    #        root   html;
    #        index  index.html index.htm;
    #    }
    #}


    # HTTPS server
    #
    #server {
    #    listen       443;
    #    server_name  localhost;

    #    ssl                  on;
    #    ssl_certificate      cert.pem;
    #    ssl_certificate_key  cert.key;

    #    ssl_session_timeout  5m;

    #    ssl_protocols  SSLv2 SSLv3 TLSv1;
    #    ssl_ciphers  HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5;
    #    ssl_prefer_server_ciphers   on;

    #    location / {
    #        root   html;
    #        index  index.html index.htm;
    #    }
    #}

}</code>


/etc/nginx/php.conf

<code>server {
        listen       80;
        server_name _;
        #charset utf-8
        root  /mnt/mmcblk0/Web/www;
        index  index.html index.htm index.php default.php;
        #error_page   500 502 503 504  /50x.html;

        #location = /50x.html {
        #root html;
        #}

        location ~* ^.+\.php(\/.*)*$ {
                #fastcgi_pass   127.0.0.1:9000;
		fastcgi_pass unix:/var/run/php7-fpm.sock;
                fastcgi_index  index.php;
                fastcgi_param  SCRIPT_FILENAME  $document_root$fastcgi_script_name;
                include        fastcgi_params;
		client_max_body_size	2048m;
        }

        #error_page   404   /404.html;

        # Deny access to PHP files in specific directory
        #location ~ /(wp-content|uploads|wp-includes|images)/.*\.php$ { deny all; }


        location ~ .*\.(gif|jpg|jpeg|png|bmp|swf)$
        {
            expires      30d;
        }

        location ~ .*\.(js|css)?$
        {
            expires      12h;
        }

        location ~ /.well-known {
            allow all;
        }

        location ~ /\.
        {
            deny all;
        }

}</code>


/etc/php.ini

<code>[PHP]
zend.ze1_compatibility_mode = Off

; Language Options

engine = On
short_open_tag = On
precision    =  12
y2k_compliance = On
output_buffering = Off
;output_handler =
zlib.output_compression = Off
;zlib.output_compression_level = -1
;zlib.output_handler =
implicit_flush = Off
unserialize_callback_func =
serialize_precision = 100

;open_basedir =
disable_functions =
disable_classes =

; Colors for Syntax Highlighting mode.  Anything that's acceptable in
; <span style="color: ???????"> would work.
;highlight.string  = #DD0000
;highlight.comment = #FF9900
;highlight.keyword = #007700
;highlight.bg      = #FFFFFF
;highlight.default = #0000BB
;highlight.html    = #000000

;ignore_user_abort = On
;realpath_cache_size = 16k
;realpath_cache_ttl = 120

; Miscellaneous

expose_php = On

; Resource Limits

max_execution_time = 500	; Maximum execution time of each script, in seconds.
max_input_time = 120	; Maximum amount of time each script may spend parsing request data.
;max_input_nesting_level = 64
memory_limit = 16M	; Maximum amount of memory a script may consume.

; Error handling and logging

; Error Level Constants:
; E_ALL             - All errors and warnings (includes E_STRICT as of PHP 6.0.0)
; E_ERROR           - fatal run-time errors
; E_RECOVERABLE_ERROR  - almost fatal run-time errors
; E_WARNING         - run-time warnings (non-fatal errors)
; E_PARSE           - compile-time parse errors
; E_NOTICE          - run-time notices (these are warnings which often result
;                     from a bug in your code, but it's possible that it was
;                     intentional (e.g., using an uninitialized variable and
;                     relying on the fact it's automatically initialized to an
;                     empty string)
; E_STRICT			- run-time notices, enable to have PHP suggest changes
;                     to your code which will ensure the best interoperability
;                     and forward compatibility of your code
; E_CORE_ERROR      - fatal errors that occur during PHP's initial startup
; E_CORE_WARNING    - warnings (non-fatal errors) that occur during PHP's
;                     initial startup
; E_COMPILE_ERROR   - fatal compile-time errors
; E_COMPILE_WARNING - compile-time warnings (non-fatal errors)
; E_USER_ERROR      - user-generated error message
; E_USER_WARNING    - user-generated warning message
; E_USER_NOTICE     - user-generated notice message
; E_DEPRECATED      - warn about code that will not work in future versions
;                     of PHP
; E_USER_DEPRECATED - user-generated deprecation warnings
;
; Common Values:
;   E_ALL & ~E_NOTICE  (Show all errors, except for notices and coding standards warnings.)
;   E_ALL & ~E_NOTICE | E_STRICT  (Show all errors, except for notices)
;   E_COMPILE_ERROR|E_RECOVERABLE_ERROR|E_ERROR|E_CORE_ERROR  (Show only errors)
;   E_ALL | E_STRICT  (Show all errors, warnings and notices including coding standards.)
; Default Value: E_ALL & ~E_NOTICE
error_reporting  =  E_ALL & ~E_NOTICE & ~E_STRICT

display_errors = On
display_startup_errors = Off
log_errors = Off
log_errors_max_len = 1024
ignore_repeated_errors = Off
ignore_repeated_source = Off
report_memleaks = On
;report_zend_debug = 0
track_errors = Off
;html_errors = Off
;docref_root = "/phpmanual/"
;docref_ext = .html
;error_prepend_string = "<font color=#ff0000>"
;error_append_string = "</font>"
; Log errors to specified file.
;error_log = /var/log/php_errors.log
; Log errors to syslog.
;error_log = syslog

; Data Handling

;arg_separator.output = "&amp;"
;arg_separator.input = ";&"
variables_order = "EGPCS"
request_order = "GP"
register_globals = Off
register_long_arrays = Off
register_argc_argv = On
auto_globals_jit = On
post_max_size = 2048M
;magic_quotes_gpc = Off
magic_quotes_runtime = Off
magic_quotes_sybase = Off
auto_prepend_file =
auto_append_file =
default_mimetype = "text/html"
;default_charset = "iso-8859-1"
;always_populate_raw_post_data = On

; Paths and Directories

; UNIX: "/path1:/path2"
;include_path = ".:/php/includes"
#doc_root = "/www"
user_dir =
extension_dir = "/usr/lib/php"
enable_dl = On
;cgi.force_redirect = 1
;cgi.nph = 1
;cgi.redirect_status_env = ;
cgi.fix_pathinfo=1
;fastcgi.impersonate = 1;
;fastcgi.logging = 0
;cgi.rfc2616_headers = 0

; File Uploads

file_uploads = On
upload_tmp_dir = "/mnt/mmcblk0/Web/tmp"
upload_max_filesize = 2048M
max_file_uploads = 20

; Fopen wrappers

allow_url_fopen = On
allow_url_include = Off
;from="john@doe.com"
;user_agent="PHP"
default_socket_timeout = 60
;auto_detect_line_endings = Off</span></code>


/etc/my.cnf

<code>[client]
port		= 3306
socket		= /var/run/mysqld.sock

[mysqld]
user		= root
socket		= /var/run/mysqld.sock
port		= 3306
basedir		= /usr

############ Don't put this on the NAND #############
# Figure out where you are going to put the databases
# And run mysql_install_db --force
datadir		= /mnt/mmcblk0/Web/mysql/

######### This should also not go on the NAND #######
tmpdir		= /mnt/mmcblk0/Web/tmp/

skip-external-locking

bind-address		= 127.0.0.1

# Fine Tuning
key_buffer		= 16M
max_allowed_packet	= 16M
thread_stack		= 192K
thread_cache_size       = 8

# Here you can see queries with especially long duration
#log_slow_queries	= /var/log/mysql/mysql-slow.log
#long_query_time = 2
#log-queries-not-using-indexes

# The following can be used as easy to replay backup logs or for replication.
#server-id		= 1
#log_bin			= /var/log/mysql/mysql-bin.log
#expire_logs_days	= 10
#max_binlog_size         = 100M
#binlog_do_db		= include_database_name
#binlog_ignore_db	= include_database_name


[mysqldump]
quick
quote-names
max_allowed_packet	= 16M

[mysql]
#no-auto-rehash	# faster start of mysql but no tab completition

[isamchk]
key_buffer		= 16M</code>


/etc/php7-fpm.d/www.conf

<code>; Start a new pool named 'www'.
; the variable $pool can we used in any directive and will be replaced by the
; pool name ('www' here)
[www]

; Per pool prefix
; It only applies on the following directives:
; - 'slowlog'
; - 'listen' (unixsocket)
; - 'chroot'
; - 'chdir'
; - 'php_values'
; - 'php_admin_values'
; When not set, the global prefix (or /usr) applies instead.
; Note: This directive can also be relative to the global prefix.
; Default Value: none
;prefix = /path/to/pools/$pool

; Unix user/group of processes
; Note: The user is mandatory. If the group is not set, the default user's group
;       will be used.
user = root
;group = root

; The address on which to accept FastCGI requests.
; Valid syntaxes are:
;   'ip.add.re.ss:port'    - to listen on a TCP socket to a specific address on
;                            a specific port;
;   'port'                 - to listen on a TCP socket to all addresses on a
;                            specific port;
;   '/path/to/unix/socket' - to listen on a unix socket.
; Note: This value is mandatory.
;listen = 127.0.0.1:9000 
listen = /var/run/php7-fpm.sock

; Set listen(2) backlog.
; Default Value: 128 (-1 on FreeBSD and OpenBSD)
;listen.backlog = 128

; Set permissions for unix socket, if one is used. In Linux, read/write
; permissions must be set in order to allow connections from a web server. Many
; BSD-derived systems allow connections regardless of permissions. 
; Default Values: user and group are set as the running user
;                 mode is set to 0666
listen.owner = root
listen.group = root
listen.mode = 0666

; List of ipv4 addresses of FastCGI clients which are allowed to connect.
; Equivalent to the FCGI_WEB_SERVER_ADDRS environment variable in the original
; PHP FCGI (5.2.2+). Makes sense only with a tcp listening socket. Each address
; must be separated by a comma. If this value is left blank, connections will be
; accepted from any ip address.
; Default Value: any
;listen.allowed_clients = 127.0.0.1

; Specify the nice(2) priority to apply to the pool processes (only if set)
; The value can vary from -19 (highest priority) to 20 (lower priority)
; Note: - It will only work if the FPM master process is launched as root
;       - The pool processes will inherit the master process priority
;         unless it specified otherwise
; Default Value: no set
; priority = -19

; Choose how the process manager will control the number of child processes.
; Possible Values:
;   static  - a fixed number (pm.max_children) of child processes;
;   dynamic - the number of child processes are set dynamically based on the
;             following directives. With this process management, there will be
;             always at least 1 children.
;             pm.max_children      - the maximum number of children that can
;                                    be alive at the same time.
;             pm.start_servers     - the number of children created on startup.
;             pm.min_spare_servers - the minimum number of children in 'idle'
;                                    state (waiting to process). If the number
;                                    of 'idle' processes is less than this
;                                    number then some children will be created.
;             pm.max_spare_servers - the maximum number of children in 'idle'
;                                    state (waiting to process). If the number
;                                    of 'idle' processes is greater than this
;                                    number then some children will be killed.
;  ondemand - no children are created at startup. Children will be forked when
;             new requests will connect. The following parameter are used:
;             pm.max_children           - the maximum number of children that
;                                         can be alive at the same time.
;             pm.process_idle_timeout   - The number of seconds after which
;                                         an idle process will be killed.
; Note: This value is mandatory.
pm = dynamic

; The number of child processes to be created when pm is set to 'static' and the
; maximum number of child processes when pm is set to 'dynamic' or 'ondemand'.
; This value sets the limit on the number of simultaneous requests that will be
; served. Equivalent to the ApacheMaxClients directive with mpm_prefork.
; Equivalent to the PHP_FCGI_CHILDREN environment variable in the original PHP
; CGI. The below defaults are based on a server without much resources. Don't
; forget to tweak pm.* to fit your needs.
; Note: Used when pm is set to 'static', 'dynamic' or 'ondemand'
; Note: This value is mandatory.
pm.max_children = 5

; The number of child processes created on startup.
; Note: Used only when pm is set to 'dynamic'
; Default Value: min_spare_servers + (max_spare_servers - min_spare_servers) / 2
pm.start_servers = 2

; The desired minimum number of idle server processes.
; Note: Used only when pm is set to 'dynamic'
; Note: Mandatory when pm is set to 'dynamic'
pm.min_spare_servers = 1

; The desired maximum number of idle server processes.
; Note: Used only when pm is set to 'dynamic'
; Note: Mandatory when pm is set to 'dynamic'
pm.max_spare_servers = 3

; The number of seconds after which an idle process will be killed.
; Note: Used only when pm is set to 'ondemand'
; Default Value: 10s
;pm.process_idle_timeout = 10s;

; The number of requests each child process should execute before respawning.
; This can be useful to work around memory leaks in 3rd party libraries. For
; endless request processing specify '0'. Equivalent to PHP_FCGI_MAX_REQUESTS.
; Default Value: 0
;pm.max_requests = 500

; The URI to view the FPM status page. If this value is not set, no URI will be
; recognized as a status page. It shows the following informations:
;   pool                 - the name of the pool;
;   process manager      - static, dynamic or ondemand;
;   start time           - the date and time FPM has started;
;   start since          - number of seconds since FPM has started;
;   accepted conn        - the number of request accepted by the pool;
;   listen queue         - the number of request in the queue of pending
;                          connections (see backlog in listen(2));
;   max listen queue     - the maximum number of requests in the queue
;                          of pending connections since FPM has started;
;   listen queue len     - the size of the socket queue of pending connections;
;   idle processes       - the number of idle processes;
;   active processes     - the number of active processes;
;   total processes      - the number of idle + active processes;
;   max active processes - the maximum number of active processes since FPM
;                          has started;
;   max children reached - number of times, the process limit has been reached,
;                          when pm tries to start more children (works only for
;                          pm 'dynamic' and 'ondemand');
; Value are updated in real time.
; Example output:
;   pool:                 www
;   process manager:      static
;   start time:           01/Jul/2011:17:53:49 +0200
;   start since:          62636
;   accepted conn:        190460
;   listen queue:         0
;   max listen queue:     1
;   listen queue len:     42
;   idle processes:       4
;   active processes:     11
;   total processes:      15
;   max active processes: 12
;   max children reached: 0
;
; By default the status page output is formatted as text/plain. Passing either
; 'html', 'xml' or 'json' in the query string will return the corresponding
; output syntax. Example:
;   http://www.foo.bar/status
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?json
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?html
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?xml
;
; By default the status page only outputs short status. Passing 'full' in the
; query string will also return status for each pool process.
; Example: 
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?full
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?json&full
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?html&full
;   http://www.foo.bar/status?xml&full
; The Full status returns for each process:
;   pid                  - the PID of the process;
;   state                - the state of the process (Idle, Running, ...);
;   start time           - the date and time the process has started;
;   start since          - the number of seconds since the process has started;
;   requests             - the number of requests the process has served;
;   request duration     - the duration in µs of the requests;
;   request method       - the request method (GET, POST, ...);
;   request URI          - the request URI with the query string;
;   content length       - the content length of the request (only with POST);
;   user                 - the user (PHP_AUTH_USER) (or '-' if not set);
;   script               - the main script called (or '-' if not set);
;   last request cpu     - the %cpu the last request consumed
;                          it's always 0 if the process is not in Idle state
;                          because CPU calculation is done when the request
;                          processing has terminated;
;   last request memory  - the max amount of memory the last request consumed
;                          it's always 0 if the process is not in Idle state
;                          because memory calculation is done when the request
;                          processing has terminated;
; If the process is in Idle state, then informations are related to the
; last request the process has served. Otherwise informations are related to
; the current request being served.
; Example output:
;   ************************
;   pid:                  31330
;   state:                Running
;   start time:           01/Jul/2011:17:53:49 +0200
;   start since:          63087
;   requests:             12808
;   request duration:     1250261
;   request method:       GET
;   request URI:          /test_mem.php?N=10000
;   content length:       0
;   user:                 -
;   script:               /home/fat/web/docs/php/test_mem.php
;   last request cpu:     0.00
;   last request memory:  0
;
; Note: There is a real-time FPM status monitoring sample web page available
;       It's available in: ${prefix}/share/fpm/status.html
;
; Note: The value must start with a leading slash (/). The value can be
;       anything, but it may not be a good idea to use the .php extension or it
;       may conflict with a real PHP file.
; Default Value: not set 
;pm.status_path = /status

; The ping URI to call the monitoring page of FPM. If this value is not set, no
; URI will be recognized as a ping page. This could be used to test from outside
; that FPM is alive and responding, or to
; - create a graph of FPM availability (rrd or such);
; - remove a server from a group if it is not responding (load balancing);
; - trigger alerts for the operating team (24/7).
; Note: The value must start with a leading slash (/). The value can be
;       anything, but it may not be a good idea to use the .php extension or it
;       may conflict with a real PHP file.
; Default Value: not set
;ping.path = /ping

; This directive may be used to customize the response of a ping request. The
; response is formatted as text/plain with a 200 response code.
; Default Value: pong
;ping.response = pong

; The access log file
; Default: not set
;access.log = log/$pool.access.log

; The access log format.
; The following syntax is allowed
;  %%: the '%' character
;  %C: %CPU used by the request
;      it can accept the following format:
;      - %{user}C for user CPU only
;      - %{system}C for system CPU only
;      - %{total}C  for user + system CPU (default)
;  %d: time taken to serve the request
;      it can accept the following format:
;      - %{seconds}d (default)
;      - %{miliseconds}d
;      - %{mili}d
;      - %{microseconds}d
;      - %{micro}d
;  %e: an environment variable (same as $_ENV or $_SERVER)
;      it must be associated with embraces to specify the name of the env
;      variable. Some exemples:
;      - server specifics like: %{REQUEST_METHOD}e or %{SERVER_PROTOCOL}e
;      - HTTP headers like: %{HTTP_HOST}e or %{HTTP_USER_AGENT}e
;  %f: script filename
;  %l: content-length of the request (for POST request only)
;  %m: request method
;  %M: peak of memory allocated by PHP
;      it can accept the following format:
;      - %{bytes}M (default)
;      - %{kilobytes}M
;      - %{kilo}M
;      - %{megabytes}M
;      - %{mega}M
;  %n: pool name
;  %o: ouput header
;      it must be associated with embraces to specify the name of the header:
;      - %{Content-Type}o
;      - %{X-Powered-By}o
;      - %{Transfert-Encoding}o
;      - ....
;  %p: PID of the child that serviced the request
;  %P: PID of the parent of the child that serviced the request
;  %q: the query string 
;  %Q: the '?' character if query string exists
;  %r: the request URI (without the query string, see %q and %Q)
;  %R: remote IP address
;  %s: status (response code)
;  %t: server time the request was received
;      it can accept a strftime(3) format:
;      %d/%b/%Y:%H:%M:%S %z (default)
;  %T: time the log has been written (the request has finished)
;      it can accept a strftime(3) format:
;      %d/%b/%Y:%H:%M:%S %z (default)
;  %u: remote user
;
; Default: "%R - %u %t \"%m %r\" %s"
;access.format = "%R - %u %t \"%m %r%Q%q\" %s %f %{mili}d %{kilo}M %C%%"

; The log file for slow requests
; Default Value: not set
; Note: slowlog is mandatory if request_slowlog_timeout is set
;slowlog = log/$pool.log.slow

; The timeout for serving a single request after which a PHP backtrace will be
; dumped to the 'slowlog' file. A value of '0s' means 'off'.
; Available units: s(econds)(default), m(inutes), h(ours), or d(ays)
; Default Value: 0
;request_slowlog_timeout = 0

; The timeout for serving a single request after which the worker process will
; be killed. This option should be used when the 'max_execution_time' ini option
; does not stop script execution for some reason. A value of '0' means 'off'.
; Available units: s(econds)(default), m(inutes), h(ours), or d(ays)
; Default Value: 0
;request_terminate_timeout = 0

; Set open file descriptor rlimit.
; Default Value: system defined value
;rlimit_files = 1024

; Set max core size rlimit.
; Possible Values: 'unlimited' or an integer greater or equal to 0
; Default Value: system defined value
;rlimit_core = 0

; Chroot to this directory at the start. This value must be defined as an
; absolute path. When this value is not set, chroot is not used.
; Note: you can prefix with '$prefix' to chroot to the pool prefix or one
; of its subdirectories. If the pool prefix is not set, the global prefix
; will be used instead.
; Note: chrooting is a great security feature and should be used whenever
;       possible. However, all PHP paths will be relative to the chroot
;       (error_log, sessions.save_path, ...).
; Default Value: not set
;chroot =

; Chdir to this directory at the start.
; Note: relative path can be used.
; Default Value: current directory or / when chroot
chdir = /

; Redirect worker stdout and stderr into main error log. If not set, stdout and
; stderr will be redirected to /dev/null according to FastCGI specs.
; Note: on highloaded environement, this can cause some delay in the page
; process time (several ms).
; Default Value: no
;catch_workers_output = yes

; Limits the extensions of the main script FPM will allow to parse. This can
; prevent configuration mistakes on the web server side. You should only limit
; FPM to .php extensions to prevent malicious users to use other extensions to
; exectute php code.
; Note: set an empty value to allow all extensions.
; Default Value: .php
;security.limit_extensions = .php .php3 .php4 .php5

; Pass environment variables like LD_LIBRARY_PATH. All $VARIABLEs are taken from
; the current environment.
; Default Value: clean env
;env[HOSTNAME] = $HOSTNAME
;env[PATH] = /usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin
;env[TMP] = /tmp
;env[TMPDIR] = /tmp
;env[TEMP] = /tmp

; Additional php.ini defines, specific to this pool of workers. These settings
; overwrite the values previously defined in the php.ini. The directives are the
; same as the PHP SAPI:
;   php_value/php_flag             - you can set classic ini defines which can
;                                    be overwritten from PHP call 'ini_set'. 
;   php_admin_value/php_admin_flag - these directives won't be overwritten by
;                                     PHP call 'ini_set'
; For php_*flag, valid values are on, off, 1, 0, true, false, yes or no.

; Defining 'extension' will load the corresponding shared extension from
; extension_dir. Defining 'disable_functions' or 'disable_classes' will not
; overwrite previously defined php.ini values, but will append the new value
; instead.

; Note: path INI options can be relative and will be expanded with the prefix
; (pool, global or /usr)

; Default Value: nothing is defined by default except the values in php.ini and
;                specified at startup with the -d argument
;php_admin_value[sendmail_path] = /usr/sbin/sendmail -t -i -f www@my.domain.com
;php_flag[display_errors] = off
;php_admin_value[error_log] = /var/log/fpm-php.www.log
;php_admin_flag[log_errors] = on
;php_admin_value[memory_limit] = 32M</code>


因为我要用root启动fpm所以要改一下:

/etc/init.d/php7-fpm

<code>#!/bin/sh /etc/rc.common

START=50

PROG=/usr/bin/php-fpm
CONFIG=/etc/php7-fpm.conf
#CONFIG=/etc/php7-fdm.d/www.conf

SERVICE_PID_FILE=/var/run/php7-fpm.pid

start_instance() {
	local section="$1"
	local enabled

	config_get_bool enabled "$section" 'enabled' 0

	[ $enabled -gt 0 ] || return 1

	service_start $PROG -y $CONFIG -g $SERVICE_PID_FILE -R
}

start() {
	config_load 'php7-fpm'
	config_foreach start_instance 'php7-fpm'
}

stop() {
	service_stop $PROG
}</code>]]></content:encoded>

		<title>将TicwatchE刷成AndroidWear / Wear OS</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/03/11/flash-the-ticwatch-e-to-wear-os/</link>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[How to flash your Ticwatch E to Android Wear / Wear OS

本教程将教你备份手表和将手表刷成Android Wear / Wear OS系统

理论上Ticwatch S通用, Ticwatch 2刷了之后振动器和麦克风不可用
<h4>还原备份之后不能记步, 这是ticwear的bug, 鬼知道他会不会修，请确定你真的需要</h4>
NFC 模块的开关会一直维持，理论上公交卡在ticwear设置好在wear os是可以使用的

<hr />

<h3>这里拒绝提供有偿服务 ←_←</h3>
你可以捐助服务器费用，但是不会对你提供任何其他额外的帮助

<hr />

<h3>它们不自觉替换自己的基带,</h3>
<h3>并教别人不用备份且违反IEEE规则造成严重后果</h3>
<ol>
 	<li>QQ: 707229308  陈琛
问问论坛uid=84455 A-chen
(严重人品问题,自称畜生,永久不得恢复)</li>
 	<li>问问论坛uid=78394  Shawn_Zhang</li>
</ol>
<!--more-->

<hr />

<h3>搬运一个Wear OS系统更新的fastboot更新包</h3>
reboot到fastboot解锁(<code>oem unlock</code>)之后就可以通过flash-all.bat直接刷入啦

TicwatchOreoUpdate.7z(<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/1v_UdPb6ff3P4XSeixz3M-w">百度云</a> 密码:ed8v)

<hr />

<h3>准备</h3>
首先,win10已经带了MTK驱动所以就不用装驱动了

你需要准备:
<ol>
 	<li>SP_Flash_Tool_v5.1744_Win 或以上版本</li>
 	<li>TicwearToAndroidWear.7z (<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/1w6nbnsYaIeHQLnY77LvgaA" target="_blank" rel="noopener">百度云</a> 密码: avxw)</li>
 	<li>MT2601_Android_scatter.txt (<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/1RrHoYHkSXuf-a0mCMluwVg" target="_blank" rel="noopener">百度云</a> 密码:mse7)</li>
 	<li>wxMEdit 或其他hex编辑器</li>
</ol>

<hr />

<h3>备份</h3>
<h2><span style="color: #ff0000;">请务必备份,不备份你可能会砖头</span></h2>
<h2><span style="color: #ff0000;">(反正我没试过)</span></h2>
<h4><span style="color: #ff0000;">后面需要替换文件</span></h4>
根据反馈,有的表通电自动开机,备份会失败,下面是一些鬼点子:
<ol>
 	<li>先重启进fastboot或者recovery然后在里面关机</li>
 	<li>拿夹子夹住电源键直到备份完毕</li>
 	<li>如果你能保持按住电源键十多分钟的话,一直按住他直到备份完毕</li>
</ol>
&nbsp;

<a href="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Snipaste_2018-03-11_12-42-48.png"><img src="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Snipaste_2018-03-11_12-42-48.png" alt="Snipaste_2018-03-11_12-42-48.png" /></a>
<ol>
 	<li>choose 准备的 MT2601_Android_scatter.txt</li>
 	<li>切换到 Readback 标签页</li>
 	<li>点击 Add 添加</li>
 	<li>双击 新增的那一条</li>
 	<li>和 MT2601_Android_scatter.txt 放在一起,文件名和 file_name 相同</li>
 	<li>选择分区,输入地址和地址和长度</li>
 	<li>循环步骤 3到6 ,直到所有分区(共21个)都添加进去</li>
 	<li>点击 Read Back 按钮</li>
 	<li>将手表关机,然后插上usb</li>
 	<li>直到弹出绿色的 ✔ 备份完成</li>
 	<li>手表按住电源键直到重启(10秒左右)</li>
</ol>
&nbsp;
<h3>修改preloader.bin</h3>
<a href="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Snipaste_2018-03-11_13-02-14.png"><img src="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Snipaste_2018-03-11_13-02-14.png" alt="Snipaste_2018-03-11_13-02-14.png" /></a>

<span style="color: #ff0000;">给喷子的提示: 删除完了请仔细检查,不要把你在Windows的垃圾习惯带进来</span>
<ol>
 	<li>打开 preloader.bin</li>
 	<li>删除红线前面的部分( MMM 前面的,注意前面不要有空格)</li>
 	<li>删除红线下面的部分(后面全是 FF 或者 00 ,每台机的结尾可能不一样,按实际情况操作)</li>
 	<li>保存</li>
</ol>

<hr />

<h3>刷机</h3>
<a href="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Snipaste_2018-03-11_13-08-24.png"><img src="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/Snipaste_2018-03-11_13-08-24.png" alt="Snipaste_2018-03-11_13-08-24.png" /></a>
<ol>
 	<li>解压 TicwearToAndroidWear.7z</li>
 	<li>choose 解压出来的 MT2601_Android_scatter_GPT_Dump.txt</li>
 	<li>在 preloader, nvram 和 nvdata 右边双击选择<span style="color: #ff0000;">备份的</span> preloader.img, nvram.img 和 nvdata.img</li>
 	<li>Download only 换成 Format All + Download</li>
 	<li>点击 Download 按钮</li>
 	<li>将手表关机,然后插上usb</li>
 	<li>直到弹出绿色的 ✔ 备份完成</li>
 	<li>手表按住电源键直到重启(10秒左右)</li>
</ol>

<hr />

<h3>TWRP &amp; Root</h3>
<span style="color: #ff0000;">Ticwear的root会导致每次开机都会"优化"所有应用</span>

你需要准备:
<ol>
 	<li>adb工具箱(带fastboot),不知道是什么的可以问公司的 Android 开发</li>
 	<li>TWRP_TicwatchE_v003.img (<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/1WXGeOlW3CsZVN_5JiFmkRw" target="_blank" rel="noopener">百度云</a> 密码:8wdu)</li>
 	<li>如果是8.0,请刷入 Magisk.zip (<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/1g-E03A16D2HtzoMoxFcQQg">百度云</a> 密码:ma1v)</li>
 	<li>如果是 Ticwear 请使用专用的 TWRP (<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/1PEax2ZjBr7M0r3BlSQm_CQ" target="_blank" rel="noopener">百度云</a> 密码:n7dp)
并从Super SU官网下载一个 <a href="http://www.supersu.com/download">zip包</a></li>
</ol>
本操作会丢失所有用户数据,可以先用SP Flash Tool备份一下userdata
<ol>
 	<li>打开usb调试,连接上电脑装好一切驱动(win10又带了)</li>
 	<li>如果是8.0,<code>adb push </code> 把 <code>Magisk.zip</code> 拖进来<code> /sdcard</code>
如果是TicWear,<code>adb push </code> 把 <code>从Super SU官网下载的zip</code> 拖进来<code> /sdcard</code></li>
 	<li><code>adb reboot bootloader</code></li>
 	<li>这时手表重启进入到fastboot</li>
 	<li><code>fastboot flash recovery </code> 把 <code>TWRP_TicwatchE_v003.img</code> 拖进来, 如果是TicWear,拖入<code>TicWear_TWRP_recovery.img</code></li>
 	<li>若 OKAY 跳到第13步,如果不行就继续</li>
 	<li><code>fastboot oem lock</code></li>
 	<li>长按表冠同意</li>
 	<li><code>fastboot oem unlock</code></li>
 	<li>长按表冠同意</li>
 	<li><code>fastboot format userdata</code></li>
 	<li>跳到第5步</li>
 	<li><code>fastboot oem reboot-recovery</code></li>
 	<li>看一下能不能挂载data,可以的话跳到第16步,如果不行长按10秒把手表关了然后继续</li>
 	<li>用SP Flash Tool重新刷入userdata.img(只勾选这一个就可以了)也可以选择备份的userdata</li>
 	<li>手表按住电源键直到重启(10秒左右)</li>
 	<li>进到系统开usb调试</li>
 	<li><code>adb reboot recovery</code></li>
 	<li>这时手表重启来到twrp(有一个system只读的提示忽略他)</li>
 	<li>如果是TicWear:
Install -&gt; Install ZIP -&gt; 从Super SU官网下载的zip
如果是8.0:
Install -&gt; Install ZIP -&gt; Magisk.zip
如果不是:
Install -&gt; Install ZIP -&gt; supersu文件夹 -&gt; SuperSU-2.79-wear_systemless.zip (请勿理会error 2)</li>
 	<li>reboot -&gt; system</li>
</ol>

<hr />

<h3>Tips</h3>
<ol>
 	<li>apk(<a href="https://pan.baidu.com/s/14ByEHUynXc7n_otPq0E34w" target="_blank" rel="noopener">百度云</a> 密码:xvnv)</li>
 	<li>在设置中停用 Tic 相关应用可大幅节省耗电量</li>
 	<li>备份步骤可选(你可以只备份 nvram 和 nvdata ),如果不喜欢 Android Wear 可以刷回备份,那么你就回到ticwear了</li>
 	<li>Ticwatch 2 USB:
<a href="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/O6aFSie.jpg"><img class="alignnone" src="http://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/O6aFSie.jpg" alt="O6aFSie.jpg" width="271" height="322" /></a></li>
 	<li>打开蓝牙可查找:
<code>adb shell “am start -a android.bluetooth.adapter.action.REQUEST_DISCOVERABLE”</code></li>
</ol>
&nbsp;

<hr />

<ol>
 	<li>kevin</li>
 	<li>雁门飞雪</li>
 	<li>EpicLPer</li>
</ol>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[今天是愚人节

讲一个笑话：
esp8285 = esp8266 + 1mb flash

8285资料贼少，折腾了三天，发现 SPI Mode 要设置成 DOUT 才能正常启动，而且有一部分固件这样写进去有一定的问题

	<item>
		<title>null与&#039;&#039;(空字符串)</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/05/09/null%e4%b8%8e%e7%a9%ba%e5%ad%97%e7%ac%a6%e4%b8%b2/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 09 May 2018 07:51:29 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sparkle.toh.info/?p=961</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<h3>在JavaScript中:</h3>
<code>null == ''</code>返回true
<code>null === ''</code>返回false

<hr />

<h3>在Oracle中:</h3>
<code>null</code>和<code>''</code>是一个东西

<code>''</code>会自动转成<code>null</code>

<hr />

<h3>在Mysql中:</h3>
<code>''</code>是空字符串
<code>null</code>是null
(为什么觉得这是废话)
在设置字段<code>not null</code>的时候依然可以插入<code>''</code>]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[]]></excerpt:encoded>
		<wp:post_id>961</wp:post_id>
		<wp:post_date><![CDATA[2018-05-09 15:51:29]]></wp:post_date>
		<wp:post_date_gmt><![CDATA[2018-05-09 07:51:29]]></wp:post_date_gmt>
		<wp:comment_status><![CDATA[open]]></wp:comment_status>
		<wp:ping_status><![CDATA[open]]></wp:ping_status>
		<wp:post_name><![CDATA[null%e4%b8%8e%e7%a9%ba%e5%ad%97%e7%ac%a6%e4%b8%b2]]></wp:post_name>
		<wp:status><![CDATA[publish]]></wp:status>
		<wp:post_parent>0</wp:post_parent>
		<wp:menu_order>0</wp:menu_order>
		<wp:post_type><![CDATA[post]]></wp:post_type>
		<wp:post_password><![CDATA[]]></wp:post_password>
		<wp:is_sticky>0</wp:is_sticky>
		<category domain="category" nicename="bug"><![CDATA[坑]]></category>
		<wp:postmeta>
			<wp:meta_key><![CDATA[_edit_last]]></wp:meta_key>
			<wp:meta_value><![CDATA[1]]></wp:meta_value>

	<item>
		<title>iTop通过Email自动生成工单</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/05/22/itop%e9%80%9a%e8%bf%87email%e8%87%aa%e5%8a%a8%e7%94%9f%e6%88%90%e5%b7%a5%e5%8d%95/</link>
		<pubDate>Tue, 22 May 2018 04:05:11 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sparkle.toh.info/?p=970</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[因为有这个需求,然后就折腾了一下

然后有了这个教程

iTop国内资料真少...

&nbsp;

<!--more-->
<h2>iTop安装</h2>
<ul>
 	<li>官网下个zip丢到www浏览器运行安装程序就行了</li>
 	<li>需要安装php的pop3或者imap模块,我这里用的是imap(因为刚好有php源代码编译了安装进去就行了,安装方法在最后面)</li>
 	<li>iTop对环境要求比较高,最好把php.ini里面的disable_function注释掉不要禁用任何函数</li>
 	<li>如果用的是Nginx注意在配置文件的server里面的server_name配置好,不要使用_通配符</li>
</ul>
&nbsp;
<h2>在iTop Hub安装插件</h2>
<ol>
 	<li>菜单 iTop Hub -&gt; Connect to iTop Hub</li>
 	<li>然后安装 <a href="https://store.itophub.io/en_US/products/combodo-mail-to-ticket-automation">这个插件</a></li>
</ol>
&nbsp;
<h2>配置</h2>
<ol>
 	<li>菜单 管理工具-&gt; Incoming eMail Inboxes -&gt; 新建...</li>
 	<li>配置一下接收工单的邮箱的信息</li>
 	<li>菜单 配置管理 -&gt; 新联系人 -&gt; 人员</li>
 	<li>将所有发工单的邮箱添加为人员,联系资料中的Email填写发工单的邮箱</li>
 	<li>运行cron.php:
<h4>终端开个screen运行:</h4>
<code>cd iTop目录/webservices</code>

<code>php cron.php --auth_user=admin的用户名 --auth_pwd=admin的密码 --verbose=1</code>
<h4>配置一个crontab计划任务也可以:</h4>
<code>45 4 1, 10, 22 * * php安装目录/bin/php iTop目录/webservices/cron.php --auth_user=admin的用户名 --auth_pwd=admin的密码 --verbose=1</code></li>
</ol>
&nbsp;

<hr />

<h3>安装php的imap模块</h3>
<ol>
 	<li>安装libc-client-dev:
<code>apt-get install libc-client-dev</code></li>
 	<li>编译:
<code>cd php源代码目录/ext/</code><code>php安装目录/bin/phpize</code><code>./configure --with-php-config=/usr/local/php/bin/php-config --with-kerberos --with-imap-ssl</code><code>make &amp;&amp; sudo make install</code></li>
 	<li>当看到<code>Build complete.</code>即安装成功</li>
</ol>]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>修复全志开发板AV输出Overscan问题</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/05/23/fix-allwinner-av-overscan/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 23 May 2018 15:28:30 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sparkle.toh.info/?p=971</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[之前买了一个Orange Pi Zero,现在是我的智能音响

因为只有av输出没有hdmi,在av日常显示超出范围的情况下,全志居然没有Overscan这种设置

然后研究了一下有了这个教程(调了一晚上)<!--more-->

<hr />

全志有个叫script.bin和树莓派的config.txt类似,不过这个文件明显不能用编辑器打开的

<code>bin2fex /boot/script.bin ~/script.fex</code>

<code>nano ~/script.fex</code>

按 Ctrl + w 查找:<code>fb0_</code>

将<code>fb0_width = 0</code>修改成<code>fb0_width = 658</code>

将<code>fb0_height = 0</code>修改成<code>fb0_height = 548</code>

Ctrl + x 保存

<code>sudo fex2bin ~/script.fex /boot/script.bin</code>

<code>wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/harshgandhi/linuxScripts/master/devmem2.c</code>

<code>gcc devmem2.c</code>

<code>sudo mv a.out /usr/local/bin/devmem2</code>

<code>nano /etc/rc.local</code>

在文件最后的<code>exit 0</code>之前加入

<code>devmem2 0x01E00130 w 0x00c003a</code>

如果不能使用以上方法来修改，也可以用：

<code>fbset -g 658 548 658 548 32</code>

然后重启 Enjoy~

<hr />

发现NTSC在宽屏设备下显示挺不错的…比PAL下的设置要好
<code>screen0_output_mode = 11</code>
这里11是PAL,改成14就是NTSC了

对应的
<code>fb0_width = 660
fb0_height = 470</code>

如果没办法改，也能用
<code>fbset -g 660 470 660 470 32</code>

移动屏幕位置
<code>devmem2 0x01E00130 w 0x0090396</code>

这和上面的配置差不多…只是修改了一些数值
国产的东西文档总是写的不清不楚的…这些都是国外翻来的资料…]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>使用NTFS-3G代替Mac的NTFS驱动</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/07/09/%e4%bd%bf%e7%94%a8ntfs-3g%e4%bb%a3%e6%9b%bfmac%e7%9a%84ntfs%e9%a9%b1%e5%8a%a8/</link>
		<pubDate>Mon, 09 Jul 2018 15:57:19 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sparklez.gq/?p=1019</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[由于我的数据盘是NTFS的,所以我需要在Mac下读写NTFS分区

换了各种软件不是丢文件就是慢的要死

最后选择了一般Linux上的选择:NTFS-3G

文件不丢,速度也还不错(当然不会有Windows下读写那么快的)

<!--more-->
<ol>
 	<li>装一下 <a href="https://github.com/osxfuse/osxfuse/releases">FUSE for macOS</a></li>
 	<li><code>brew install ntfs-3g</code>(这里需要 <a href="https://brew.sh/">Homebrew</a> )</li>
 	<li>将系统的mount_ntfs替换成NTFS-3G的
<code>sudo mv /sbin/mount_ntfs /sbin/mount_ntfs.original</code>
<code>sudo ln -s /usr/local/sbin/mount_ntfs /sbin/mount_ntfs</code></li>
 	<li>磁盘工具 -&gt; 卸载 -&gt; 装载</li>
</ol>]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>关于rm -rf的坑</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/07/11/%e5%85%b3%e4%ba%8erm-rf%e7%9a%84%e5%9d%91/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 11 Jul 2018 06:03:10 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sparklez.gq/?p=1020</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[巨坑啊...平时用zsh时按tab出来之后,按回车前最后的 <code>/</code> 会自动去掉

写在脚本里就emmmm...

&nbsp;

当 <code>dirB</code> 里面有个 <code>dirA</code> 的软连接时

<code>.
├── dirA
│   └── fileInDirA
└── dirB
└── dirA -&gt; ../dirA
3 directories, 1 file</code>
<ol>
 	<li>执行 <code>rm -rf dirB/dirA</code> 时 <code>dirB</code> 中的 <code>dirA</code> 的软连接被删掉了
<code>.
├── dirA
│   └── fileInDirA
└── dirB
2 directories, 1 file</code></li>
 	<li>执行 <code>rm -rf dirB/dirA/</code> 时 <code>dirA</code> 的本体被删除了 <code>dirB</code> 中的软连接还在
<code>.
└── dirB
└── dirA -&gt; ../dirA
1 directory, 1 file</code></li>
</ol>
&nbsp;]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[]]></excerpt:encoded>

		<wp:ping_status><![CDATA[open]]></wp:ping_status>

	<item>
		<title>买了一个k2p</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/07/29/%e4%b9%b0%e4%ba%86%e4%b8%80%e4%b8%aak2p/</link>
		<pubDate>Sat, 28 Jul 2018 18:54:04 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://sparklez.gq/?p=1023</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[和原来的newifi 2 用5G来WDS中续,全家5g都能满格了,虽然不能跑满宽带,但是150mbps也是够快了

由于固件bug,需要重启2.4G之后WDS才能用

然后在开机启动脚本写了点东西

<code># 重启2.4G 连接WDS
radio2_disable &amp;&amp; radio2_enable
logger -t "【连接WDS】" "2.4G重启完成"</code>

<code># 挂载 /tmp 到 /opt
( mkdir -p /tmp/opt; mount --bind /tmp/opt /opt; opkg.sh; logger -t "【内存opt】" "安装 内存opt 成功"; /opt/bin/opkg install htop; logger -t "【内存opt】" "安装 htop 成功" ) &amp;</code>

<code>logger -t "【运行路由器启动后】" "脚本完成"</code>

虽然我改了usb口但是我还是没打算给他插个u盘
mount一个文件夹骗一下路由器把opt运行环境装到内存盘]]></content:encoded>

		<title>关于本站https问题</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/08/05/%e5%85%b3%e4%ba%8e%e6%9c%ac%e7%ab%99https%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98/</link>
		<pubDate>Sun, 05 Aug 2018 14:09:06 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">http://cupinkie.com/?p=1041</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[好了,现在是纯https了,不过也意味着流量消耗x2以及:
<ol>
 	<li>我把图全搬回来了,和页面放在一起(幸好服务器宽带贼快)</li>
 	<li>图片流量还是挺大的,一个月得耗掉3g的样子(全是大图)</li>
</ol>

<hr />

七牛要实名验证才能绑定域名...突然想放弃这个想法

服务器的https用了七牛一年免费证书搞定(并不是绿锁)

目前是七牛的https问题

七牛上的图全下下来了也不到200mb

<hr />

想做OneSignal Push浏览器通知推送,然后发现需要https

然后打算弄一个letsencrypt的证书

然后想想七牛那边绑定域名还要备案(不绑定没有https)

以及一些文章写死的图片url

真是头大]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>音乐人推荐 - Marcus Warner (Evening Star)</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/08/09/%e9%9f%b3%e4%b9%90%e4%ba%ba%e6%8e%a8%e8%8d%90-marcus-warner-evening-star/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 08 Aug 2018 16:29:42 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1271</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<img src="http://www.equestriacn.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/9gQa9ribJQjFZp92EDx24A3D3D2F18987466300081223.jpg" />

&nbsp;

推荐一首歌 <a href="https://music.163.com/song?id=464373796">Land of Equestria </a> songId=464373796

这首是 私人FM 听到的, 听到之后点了红心(我以为我点到了...触摸屏)

这里吐槽一下 mac OS 当你有多个窗口, 在非焦点窗口的按钮点第一下焦点会切换到窗口上而不是点到按钮

当我想找回来听的时候我发现我并没有成功收藏, 后面凭着记忆中的唱片封面图翻找回来的, 也算是找到一首好歌

<hr />

<a href="https://music.163.com/artist?id=1046308">网易云音乐歌手主页</a> artistId=1046308

出生: 1996 年（22岁）
所属唱片公司: Evening Star,  Marcus Warner
类型: 古典,  新世纪乐器演奏

<img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-15789" src="https://eqcn.ajz.miesnfu.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/1369991489389347-1533809028.jpg" alt="" width="640" height="520" />

&nbsp;

Marcus Warner 是一位青年作曲家, 配器大师和制作人, 出生于1996年, 居住在英格兰威尔特郡. 他从事音乐创作距今已经12年, 他通过原声和电子音乐的各种流派风格和写作部分, 从当代的钢琴独奏到完整的管弦乐交响乐
他描述他的目标是成为“制作史诗和令人振奋的音乐, 唤起内心”, 并树立自己在做的卓越品质, 超越其本身的每个版本. 他的音乐已经被制作商, 广播公司和国际电影制作商使用和委托
在过去的12个月, 已经超过150个网站, 跨越60多个国家和接收超过1,000,000以上倾听
Marcus 的首张专辑Grand Flying Machines, 他的作品自2013年10月发布, 已获得令人难以置信的反馈
在过去的两年过程中, Marcus 一直努力和记录各种各样音乐家带给他大量的管弦乐的生命, 制作更广泛的原声作品, 记录自己和其他艺术家的过程. 他曾与其他制作人合作混合原声大钢琴, 学生合唱团和弦乐器, 来创建一个特殊的交响音乐标准, 尝试一种管弦乐器, 合成器的融合
Marcus 演奏钢琴, 法国圆号和吉他, 并收集各种世界乐器, 如 Kalimba 克林巴琴（非洲班图人的乐器）, 葫芦丝；他喜欢威尔特郡的宁静的乡村生活和一杯浓浓的茶

Marcus 还是 MLP 的忠实观众. 在同人音乐界有很大的影响力. 其创作的小马同人音乐大多以“Evening Star”为网名发布.
他自己的OC是一匹有着黑白相间鬃毛的独角兽. 他的同人音乐较出名的有《Octavia》《Kindness》《Searching Eyes》等

<hr />

&nbsp;

<hr />

按照<a href="https://g.co/kgs/XA72mz"> Google 来的资料</a> Marcus Warner 是 1996 年生的, 也就是说, 在发布 专辑 <a href="https://music.163.com/album?id=35256484">Land of Equestria</a> 的时候只有 17岁

Marcus Warner 这位 dalao 感觉还是蛮成功的...

<hr />

顺便安利一下之前写的py小脚本: <a href="https://github.com/zanjie1999/make_lrc_music_m3u">网易云音乐歌词音乐播放列表生成器</a>

只需传入歌单id  (playlistId), 即可自动下载歌单播放列表m3u, 双语歌词lrc, 以及mp3文件

自动将 Android客户端 命名规则转为 pc客户端 命名规则

然后可以愉快的丢到你无法联网的Hi-Fi音频播放器食用

<hr />

顺便分享一下 <a href="https://music.163.com/playlist?id=737023512">我的MLP歌单</a>

第一次撰稿, 如果有什么 bug  <a href="https://cupinkie.com/message/">欢迎留言</a>]]></content:encoded>

		<title>Java还有这种操作?</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/08/10/java%e8%bf%98%e6%9c%89%e8%bf%99%e7%a7%8d%e6%93%8d%e4%bd%9c/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 10 Aug 2018 03:01:42 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1277</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<img class="alignnone size-full wp-image-1278" src="https://cupinkie.com/blog/wp-content/uploads/2018/08/null07.jpg" alt="" width="449" height="206" />

昨天发现一个bug, type超长了

背景: 存日志的时候有两位数是从前台传过来的, 数据库里好就是5位空间, 前辈写的代码

<code>null + "07"</code>

aka

<code>"null" + "07"</code>

&nbsp;]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>关于 esp8266 analogRead</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/08/19/about-esp8266-analogread/</link>
		<pubDate>Sun, 19 Aug 2018 12:34:15 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1286</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[这个周末打算做一个音频输入自动开音响的功能

期初是用stm32f103c8t6来调试的...毕竟烧录的时间比较短...

弄了一天写出来了, 烧到esp8266调试, 才发现esp8266只有gpio17(A0, ADC)可以正常analogRead

好吧原来做了双声道的改成单声道检测

调好了复制到原来音响的程序里, 发现web服务器不工作了

查了一下analogRead需要比较长的时间, 多次调试之后发现是因为不停analogRead导致cpu时间占满

然后在前面加了个
<h3>delay(1);</h3>
恩问题解决]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>目前已实现https绿锁</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/08/30/https-has-been-achieved/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 30 Aug 2018 14:22:30 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1301</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[总结出来一些问题
<ol>
 	<li>引入的路径尽量使用<code>//</code>开头而不是http或者https</li>
 	<li>另外就是关于直接编辑WordPress的设置的坑
例如:
<code>a:1:{</code>
<code>s:3:"key";s:5:value;</code>
<code>s:4:"name";s:7:"Sparkle";</code>
<code>}</code>
两个一组, 以及前面有一个长度校验字符串有多长数字就是多少
数组有多少对数字就是多少</li>
</ol>]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>GPD Pocket 2</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/09/10/gpd-pocket-2/</link>
		<pubDate>Sun, 09 Sep 2018 23:36:07 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1303</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[B站 郑羊羊
放了一个开箱测评和GTA5测试的视频

<hr />

最近众筹买了一台Pocket 2来代替我的平板

我买的是4g版本
发现8g是镁光白片而4g是镁光正片
贫穷限制了内存大小

手上这台是白色电源灯的
左边的USB实际上是2.0
屏幕转轴左边先着地
手指鼠标左边有点刮手(剪刀解决)

众筹价格3499送一个皮套
<span style="color: #ffffff;">到货一周后退100</span>

目前已实现：

<del>没有hidpi的Ubuntu 18(其实实现了但是鼠标移不到右下角</del>

<del>已实现基础显示缩放(放大字体，Chrome整个都放大了)其他没啥问题…主要是烫烫烫…</del>
<del>换kde了, hidpi支持好</del>

已摸索到解决Ubuntu18下的Gnome的Hidpi的bug的解决方案, 详见 <a href="https://cupinkie.com/2018/11/14/gnome-hidpi-fix/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">这篇文章</a>

Grub2下在bios旋转横屏情况下完美显示(给mate的那个github提issuse了,估计会整合进脚本)

凤凰os屏幕终于转过来了，无法休眠(一休眠就重启)，<del>b站视频声音图像不同步(视频慢，可能没有硬件加速，不过ui流畅，就b站播放器这样，其他正常)</del>粉色app正常

装在TF卡中不太完美的macOS(用的是我Github的8代处理器万能版本)
<ul>
 	<li>英特尔网卡肯定不行的(最多蓝牙)</li>
 	<li>内置屏幕不认</li>
 	<li>没外放(默认耳机插入状态)</li>
 	<li>emmc不认</li>
 	<li>触摸屏不能用(可能因为内置屏幕没打开)</li>
</ul>

<hr />

Ubuntu屏幕旋转

console:

修改 <code>/etc/default/grub</code>
添加 <code>fbcon=rotate:1</code> 到 <code>GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX_DEFAULT</code>

<del>顺便设置分辨率为1024x768可以正常显示grub2而不是黑屏</del>

添加这两行可以解决显示黑屏问题:
<code>GRUB_GFXMODE=1200x1920x32</code>
<code>GRUB_GFXPAYLOAD_LINUX=keep</code>

然后执行 <code>sudo update-grub</code>

&nbsp;

神奇的Gnome：

在设置里设置好

然后 <code>cp ~/.config/monitors.xml /var/lib/gdm3/.config/</code>

&nbsp;

图像撕裂问题

参考 <a href="https://github.com/stockmind/gpd-pocket-ubuntu-respin" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Pocket 1 Ubuntu</a>

<code>for i in thermald tlp va-driver-all vainfo libva1 libva2 i965-va-driver gstreamer1.0-libav gstreamer1.0-vaapi python-gi gksu git python gir1.2-appindicator3-0.1 xfonts-terminus xinput; do
sudo apt-get install -y $i
done
mkdir -p /etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/
cd display</code>
避免撕裂和触摸支持:
<code>cp 20-intel.conf /etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/20-intel.conf
cp 40-touch.conf /etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/40-touch.conf</code>

鼠标按住右键滚动:
<code>cp 40-trackpoint.conf /etc/X11/xorg.conf.d/40-trackpoint.conf</code>

然后改一下 <code>/etc/default/grub</code> 加后面两个
<code>GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="fbcon=rotate:1 i915.fastboot=1 i915.semaphores=1"</code>

如果使用KDE:
<code>echo "xrandr --output eDP1 --rotate right" &gt;&gt; /usr/share/sddm/scripts/Xsetup # Rotate Monitor0
echo "xrandr --dpi 168" &gt;&gt; /usr/share/sddm/scripts/Xsetup # Scaling 175%</code>

这是一个旋转控制插件:
<code>mkdir -p temp
cd temp
git clone https://github.com/stockmind/gpd-pocket-screen-indicator.git
cd gpd-pocket-screen-indicator
chmod +x install.sh
sudo ./install.sh
cd ../../
rm -fr temp</code>

装fcitx删掉另一个面板
<code>sudo apt-get purge fcitx-ui-qimpanel</code>

<hr />

<a href="https://github.com/zanjie1999/HidpiFix/blob/master/extend.sh" target="_blank" rel="noopener">这里</a> 有个小脚本, 可以解决KDE下不同显示器不同缩放比的问题, Gnome也可以试试, 反正我这里Gnome就是蹦了
我这里的飞利浦电视就被设置成了1369x768然后显示1920x1080的字体大小
(飞利浦也是坑人...给42寸的电视一个32寸的固件,导致设备都认为1360x768是最佳分辨率)

<hr />

Ubuntu Mate 官方给的打开方式: <a href="https://github.com/wimpysworld/gpd-pocket2-ubuntu" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Github</a>]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>Javascript和JQuery获取附近的元素</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/09/28/javascript-and-jquery-get-nearby-elements/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 28 Sep 2018 09:24:18 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1317</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[Javascript:
<code>var j = document.getElementById("content");</code>
<ol>
 	<li>获取a的全部子节点
<code>j.childNodes;</code></li>
 	<li>获取a的父节点
<code>j.parentNode;</code></li>
 	<li>获取a的下一个兄弟节点
<code>j.nextSibling;</code></li>
 	<li>获取a的上一个兄弟节点
<code>j.previousSibling;</code></li>
 	<li>获取a的第一个子节点
<code>j.firstChild;</code></li>
 	<li>获取a的最后一个子节点
<code>j.lastChild;</code></li>
</ol>
JQuery的要方便不少:
<code>var q = $("#content");</code>
<ol>
 	<li>找父亲节点，可以传入expr进行过滤，比如$("span").parent()或者$("span").parent(".class")
<code>q.parent(expr);</code></li>
 	<li>类似于jQuery.parents(expr),但是是查找所有祖先元素，不限于父元素
<code>q.parents(expr);</code></li>
 	<li>返回所有子节点，这个方法只会返回直接的孩子节点，不会返回所有的子孙节点
<code>q.children(expr);</code></li>
 	<li>返回下面的所有内容，包括节点和文本。这个方法和children()的区别就在于，包括空白文本，也会被作为一个jQuery对象返回，children()则只会返回节点
<code>q.contents();</code></li>
 	<li>返回上一个兄弟节点，不是所有的兄弟节点
<code>q.prev();</code></li>
 	<li>返回所有之前的兄弟节点
<code>q.prevAll();</code></li>
 	<li>返回下一个兄弟节点，不是所有的兄弟节点
<code>q.next();</code></li>
 	<li>返回所有之后的兄弟节点
<code>q.nextAll();</code></li>
 	<li>返回兄弟姐妹节点，不分前后
<code>q.siblings();</code></li>
 	<li>跟q.filter(expr)完全不一样。q.filter()是从初始的q对象集合中筛选出一部分，而q.find()的返回结果，不会有初始集合中的内容，比如$("p"),find("span"),是从p元素开始找,等同于$("p span")
<code>q.find(expr);</code></li>
</ol>]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>解决Linux下Pulse Audio的音质问题</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/09/29/%e8%a7%a3%e5%86%b3linux%e4%b8%8bpulse-audio%e7%9a%84%e9%9f%b3%e8%b4%a8%e9%97%ae%e9%a2%98/</link>
		<pubDate>Sat, 29 Sep 2018 14:06:38 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1320</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[我在树莓派啊橙子派这些卡板上, 通常为了声卡不冲突, 都会选择安装Pulse Audio来进行混音

然后就有了一些破音啊杂音啊一些乱七八糟的问题

通常都是因为设备的频率不对或者处理器跑不动导致的

<!--more-->

查看当前声卡的工作频率
<code>pacmd list-sinks | grep sample -A 10</code>
我这里是 sample spec: s16le 2ch 44100Hz
通常工作频率是自动的,如果不正常可以给他指定一个默认值

修改 <code>/etc/pulse/daemon.conf</code>

查找 <code>resample-method</code> 并确保都注释掉了 (我这里用 nano 所以快捷键是 Ctrl + w)

在最后添加, 并把参数改成你想要的
这里 speex-float 从0-10分别代表音频质量的差到好, 改到10估计板子跑不动, 我这里设置的是5, 工作频率不支持会没有声音
<code>resample-method = speex-float-5
default-sample-format = s16le
default-sample-rate = 44100</code>

&nbsp;

然后重启 pulseaudio
<code>pulseaudio -k
pulseaudio --start</code>

我那块全志h2+的橙子派只要设置了 resample-method 跑机器人就没声...不知道什么鬼...其他声音正常...]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>H3C路由设置nat端口转发</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/10/11/h3c-nat-server-protocol-setting/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 11 Oct 2018 15:32:38 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1323</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[我这里是一台WX2560H, 严格上来说也不是路由器吧, 只是个无线控制器

这就触及到常年用Linux路由的我的知识盲区了

官方文档也没有说到关于这个型号nat server的设置(难道是我打开的方式不对?)

最后是在其他型号的文档和Google找到的华为路由器的设置方式设置完成的(虽然说华三现在是HP的子公司, 但是控制台命令还是沿用至今啊)<!--more-->

先telnet上去, 然后进入操作视图
<code>sys</code>

然后看一下现有的设置,找到连接到互联网的那个口
<code>display current-configuration</code>

我这里是pppoe拨号的, 所以是Dialer0
<code>interface Dialer0</code>

设置端口转发
<code>nat server protocol 协议 global current-interface 外网端口 inside 内网ip 内网端口</code>

然后可以测试一下了, 换条宽带或者用移动数据测一下
如果没问题, 保存
<code>save</code>

如果要删除配置
<code>undo nat server protocol 协议 global current-interface 外网端口</code>]]></content:encoded>

	<item>
		<title>YayPonies下载捷径</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/10/12/yayponies-download-shortcut/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 12 Oct 2018 15:22:35 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1325</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[本文可以教你批量下载YayPonies的资源，YayPonies主要是英语资源，大部分资源包含英语字幕轨。

这篇文章已经咕了一个月了，我决定来填一下坑，让小白看起来更简单。

本操作适合有一定基础的电脑端用户使用，手机端不支持。如果你想开始下面的操作，请找一台电脑进行操作。<!--more-->
<h4>先安装一个aria2 (如果你有了那就跳过这个部分)：</h4>
aria2是一款开源、轻量级的多协议命令行下载工具。你可以把它安装在你的路由器，下载机，服务器，电脑，甚至手机上。

下面以Windows电脑作为例子，如果你使用的是macOS或者Linux，我想我不说你也知道怎么安装的了。（一条命令的事）

下载这个文件：<a href="https://eqcn.ajz.miesnfu.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/2018120106411763.zip" target="_blank" rel="noopener">aria2.zip</a>  并解压到一个你喜欢的地方

然后你就会得到这样的一个目录树：
<code>aria2
│  aria2.session
│  aria2c.exe
│  aria2关闭.bat
│  aria2启动.VBS
│  AUTHORS
│  ChangeLog
│  config.conf
│  COPYING
│  LICENSE.OpenSSL
│  log.txt
│
└─downloads</code>

其中<code>downloads</code>文件夹是默认的下载路径。你也可以用文本编辑器打开<code>config.conf</code>来修改设置，双击<code>aria2启动.VBS</code>即可启动aria2。（不会打开任何窗口，点完就可以了）

然后浏览器打开这个：<a href="https://ziahamza.github.io/webui-aria2/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Aria2 WebUI</a>
在"设置" -&gt; "连接设置" 中 "主机" 后后面填写 127.0.0.1 在 "端口" 后面填入 6800
点击 "保存连接设置"。

这样aria2就安装好了，是不是很简单呢~
<h4>获取下载的内容：</h4>
目前脚本支持<a href="https://yp2.yayponies.pw/videos/episodes.php">Episodes(视频)</a>，<a href="https://yp2.yayponies.pw/books/book.php">Books/Comics(书和漫画)</a>，点击链接即可打开。

选择要下载的分类，视频这里我推荐 HEVC 的版本(h265在相同画质的情况下文件更小)，如果你使用一台比较老的设备进行观看，请选择h264。选好后点击 Get Ponies!

我建议使用<a href="https://www.google.cn/chrome/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Chrome浏览器</a>以获取更好的体验

打开浏览器开发者工具，大部分的系统可以通过 F12 打开(macOS请使用 ⌘Command + ⌥Option + I)，切换到 Console 标签(控制台)，在下面复制对应的代码，粘贴到控制台中，按下回车，这时会输出一些下载地址，把输出的内容复制下来。

回到打开的 Aria2 WebUI，点击 "添加" -&gt; "使用链接"，粘贴刚刚复制的内容，点击 开始，就开始下载啦~

<a href="https://yp2.yayponies.pw/videos/episodes.php">Episodes:</a>

<code>var out = "";
for(var i=1; i &lt; $("#links").children[2].children[0].children.length; i++){
var t = $("#links").children[2].children[0].children[i];
if (t.children[2].children.length &gt; 1){
out += t.children[2].children[1].href + " " + t.children[2].children[0].href + " --out=" + ($("select").options[$("select").selectedIndex].innerHTML + t.children[0].children[0].innerHTML).replace(/[?&lt;&gt;\'\"]/g,'').replace(/[/\\|:*\s]/g,'_').replace('_-_','-').replace(/(_)\1+/g,'_') + ".mkv\n";

}
}
console.log(out);</code>

	<item>
		<title>不要尝试 iptables -P INPUT DROP</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/11/14/do-not-try-iptables-p-input-drop/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 14 Nov 2018 03:03:35 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1346</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[今天被坑了<img class="W_img_face" title="[允悲]" src="https://img.t.sinajs.cn/t4/appstyle/expression/ext/normal/83/2018new_kuxiao_org.png" alt="[允悲]" />

看了这个 <a id="cb_post_title_url" class="postTitle2" href="https://www.cnblogs.com/zongfa/p/7967935.html">Linux下iptables 禁止端口和开放端口</a>
然后执行了<code>iptables -P INPUT DROP</code>

发现ssh不上了

查了一下才发现使用 iptables -P INPUT DROP 来全部关掉input链路后，那么服务器本身发送的数据请求返回的数据同样被iptables拒之门外
现在正在尝试重启服务器恢复(没保存iptables) ​​​​

<hr />

千万千万<span style="color: #ff0000;"><strong>不要</strong></span>使用这个命令在CentOS 7卸载iptables <code>yum remove iptables</code>
这样操作会卸载掉很多系统必要的组件，那就开不了机了

CentOS 7.x 中如果不需要使用 iptables 防火墙，可以清空策略条目， 尝试停止 iptables 服务时会提示没有服务，因为centos从7开始默认用的是firewalld，这个是基于iptables的，虽然有iptables的核心，但是 iptables 的服务（iptables-services）是没安装的。所以你只要停止firewalld服务即可 <code>systemctl stop firewalld.service</code>]]></content:encoded>
		<excerpt:encoded><![CDATA[]]></excerpt:encoded>
		<wp:post_id>1346</wp:post_id>

		<wp:post_date_gmt><![CDATA[2018-11-14 03:03:35]]></wp:post_date_gmt>
		<wp:comment_status><![CDATA[open]]></wp:comment_status>
		<wp:ping_status><![CDATA[open]]></wp:ping_status>

	<item>
		<title>自定义Gnome Hidpi分辨率解决Ubuntu18高分屏问题</title>
		<link>https://cupinkie.com/2018/11/14/gnome-hidpi-fix/</link>
		<pubDate>Wed, 14 Nov 2018 15:49:37 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[zanjie1999]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://cupinkie.com/?p=1354</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[我想要一个686x1098的hidpi分辨率, 把大小x2然后cvt
<code>cvt 1372 2196</code>
然后把输出的Modeline后面的东西复制下来

把下面的内容添加到开机启动
<code>xrandr --newmode 粘贴Modeline后面的东西
xrandr --addmode eDP-1 粘贴Modeline后面""中的名称
xrandr -s 粘贴Modeline后面""中的名称
gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface scaling-factor 2</code>

我这里的配置(gpd pocket 2)写一个脚本放在/usr/bin里面然后在"启动应用程序"里面添加一下就ok了
<code>xrandr --newmode "1376x2196_60.00"  259.75  1376 1496 1640 1904  2196 2199 2209 2275 -hsync +vsync
xrandr --addmode eDP-1 "1376x2196_60.00"
xrandr -s "1376x2196_60.00" -o right
gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface scaling-factor 2</code>]]></content:encoded>
